title: oenanthe fluviatilis
intro: Oenanthe fluviatilis, also known as water celery or water parsley, is a perennial aquatic plant native to Europe, western Asia, and North Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects, making it beneficial in treating conditions such as urinary tract infections and edema. The health benefits of Oenanthe fluviatilis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support kidney function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
